TextField.description: Single-line text input for collecting short answers.

example.name: fullName
example.title: What is your full name?
example.hint: As it appears on your passport

MultilineTextField.description: Multi-line text area for collecting longer text answers.

NumberField.description: Numeric input for collecting whole or decimal numbers.

EmailAddressField.description: Text input validated as an email address.

TelephoneNumberField.description: Text input for collecting telephone numbers.

DatePartsField.description: Three separate inputs (day, month, year) for collecting full dates.

example.name: dob
example.title: What is your date of birth?

MonthYearField.description: Two inputs (month, year) for collecting partial dates.

YesNoField.description: A pair of radio buttons offering a yes/no choice.

example.name: hasAddress
example.title: Do you have a UK address?

RadiosField.description: Radio buttons allowing the user to select one option from a named list.

CheckboxesField.description: Checkboxes allowing the user to select one or more options from a named list.

SelectField.description: A dropdown select element for choosing one option from a named list.

example.name: country
example.title: Which country do you live in?

AutocompleteField.description: Text input with autocomplete suggestions sourced from a named list.

UkAddressField.label: UK Address Field
UkAddressField.description: Structured address input for collecting UK postal addresses.

FileUploadField.description: File upload control integrated with the CDP file upload service.

DeclarationField.description: A checkbox the user must tick to confirm a declaration before proceeding.

example.name: declaration
example.title: Declaration
example.content: By submitting this form you confirm the information is correct.

HiddenField.description: A non-visible field that stores a fixed value in form state without user input.

PaymentField.description: Redirects the user to GOV.UK Pay to collect a payment before proceeding.

Html.description: Display static HTML content on a page without collecting user input.

Markdown.description: Display content authored in Markdown, rendered to HTML at runtime.

InsetText.description: Display highlighted inset text using the GOV.UK inset text component.

Details.description: Display content inside a collapsible disclosure element.

example.name: helpDetails
example.title: Help with this question
example.content: More information about what we need.

List.description: Display a GOV.UK-styled list sourced from a named list definition.

EastingNorthingField.description: Paired numeric inputs for collecting British National Grid easting and northing coordinates.

OsGridRefField.label: OS Grid Ref Field
OsGridRefField.description: Text input for collecting an Ordnance Survey grid reference.

NationalGridFieldNumberField.description: Numeric input for a single National Grid coordinate component.

LatLongField.description: Paired decimal inputs for collecting WGS84 latitude and longitude coordinates.

GeospatialField.description: Composite location picker supporting multiple geospatial coordinate formats.

PageController.label: Question Page
PageController.description: The default page type. Displays a set of components and advances to the next page on submission. Omit the `controller` property to use this page type.

StartPageController.label: Start Page
StartPageController.description: The entry page of the form. Initialises the session and redirects to the first question. Must use the path `/start`.

TerminalPageController.label: Terminal Page
TerminalPageController.description: A dead-end page that does not route the user to another page. Use this for outcomes where the journey ends without proceeding to the summary — for example, an ineligibility screen.

RepeatPageController.label: Repeat Page
RepeatPageController.description: Allows the user to add multiple sets of answers to the same group of questions. Answers are stored as an array under the key defined by `repeat.options.name`.

uniqueProperties.name: repeat.options.name
uniqueProperties.description: Identifier for the repeatable section, used as the key in form state.

uniqueProperties.name: repeat.options.title
uniqueProperties.description: Label displayed per repeated item in the list summary.

uniqueProperties.name: repeat.schema.min
uniqueProperties.description: Minimum number of items the user must add.

uniqueProperties.name: repeat.schema.max
uniqueProperties.description: Maximum number of items the user can add. Cannot exceed 200.

FileUploadPageController.label: File Upload Page
FileUploadPageController.description: A question page that handles file upload via the CDP file upload service. Must contain a `FileUploadField` component.

SummaryPageController.label: Summary Page
SummaryPageController.description: Displays a check-your-answers summary of all form responses before submission. Must use the path `/summary`.

properties.required: Whether the field must be filled in. Defaults to `true`.
properties.optionalText: When `true`, appends '(optional)' to the field label.
properties.classes: Additional CSS classes applied to the component.
properties.customValidationMessage: A single custom message shown for any validation error on this field.
properties.customValidationMessages: A map of Joi error codes to custom error messages.
properties.instructionText: Alternative text read by screen readers in place of the field title.
properties.condition: Name of a condition that controls whether this component is shown.
properties.rows: Number of rows for the textarea. Defaults to 5.
properties.maxWords: Maximum number of words permitted in the text area.
properties.hideTitle: When `true`, hides the component or section title.
properties.usePostcodeLookup: When `true`, enables a postcode lookup integration.
properties.maxDaysInPast: Maximum number of days in the past the entered date can be.
properties.maxDaysInFuture: Maximum number of days in the future the entered date can be.
properties.bold: When `true`, displays option labels in bold.
properties.type: Display style for the list: `'bulleted'` or `'numbered'`.
properties.accept: Comma-separated list of accepted MIME types (e.g. `'image/png,application/pdf'`).
properties.declarationConfirmationLabel: Custom label text for the declaration checkbox.
properties.description: Description shown on the GOV.UK Pay payment page.
properties.conditionalAmounts: Condition-based payment amounts. Each entry requires a `condition` name and `amount` in pence.
properties.emailField: Name of the form field containing the user's email address for the confirmation email.
properties.min: Minimum value, character length, word count, or file count.
properties.max: Maximum value, character length, word count, or file count.
properties.regex: Regular expression pattern the value must match.
properties.content: HTML or Markdown content to display.
